languages.text:
{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Броня{/g} обладателя аугмента взрывается, нанося {uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}прямого урона{/g} всем существам в радиусе 3 клеток.
Броня и {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}отражение{/g} обладателя аугмента не могут подниматься выше 0 до конца боя.

languages.text:
La {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armadura{/g} del usuario explota, infligiendo {uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920} de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}daño directo{/g} a todas las criaturas situadas en un radio de 3 casillas.
Las puntuaciones de armadura y {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}desvío{/g} del usuario no pueden ser superiores a 0 hasta el final del combate.
languages.original_text:
The user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} explodes, dealing {uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to all creatures in a 3-cell radius.

Las puntuaciones de armadura y {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}desvío{/g} del usuario no pueden ser superiores a 0 hasta el final del combate.

languages.text:
Die {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g} des Nutzers explodiert und fügt allen Kreaturen in einem Radius von 3 Feldern {uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}Direktschaden{/g} zu.
Rüstung und {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Deflektion{/g} des Nutzers kann bis zum Ende des Kampfes 0 nicht übersteigen.
languages.original_text:

The user's armour and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} cannot be more than 0 until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Die {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g} des Nutzers explodiert und fügt allen Kreaturen in einem Radius von 3 Feldern {uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}Direktschaden{/g} zu.
Rüstung und {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Deflektion{/g} des Nutzers kann bis zum Ende des Kampfes 0 nicht übersteigen.

languages.text:
Kullanıcının {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırhı{/g} patlayarak 3 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki tüm yaratıklara {uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasar{/g} verir.
Kullanıcının zırh ve {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}saptırma{/g} değerleri, çatışma sonuna dek 0'dan büyük olamaz.
languages.original_text:
The user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} explodes, dealing {uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to all creatures in a 3-cell radius.

traits.locale_text:
Kullanıcının {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırhı{/g} patlayarak 3 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki tüm yaratıklara {uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasar{/g} verir.
Kullanıcının zırh ve {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}saptırma{/g} değerleri, çatışma sonuna dek 0'dan büyük olamaz.

languages.text:
L'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Armure{/g} de l'utilisateur explose et inflige {uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920} points de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}dégâts directs{/g} à toutes les créatures dans un rayon de 3 cases.
Son Armure et sa {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Déflexion{/g} ne peuvent excéder 0 jusqu'à la fin du combat.
languages.original_text:
The user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} explodes, dealing {uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to all creatures in a 3-cell radius.
The user's armour and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} cannot be more than 0 until the end of combat.

Son Armure et sa {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Déflexion{/g} ne peuvent excéder 0 jusqu'à la fin du combat.

languages.text:
使用者引爆{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}，对3格内的所有生物造成{uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920}点{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直击伤害{/g}。
直到战斗结束，使用者的护甲和{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}偏转{/g}最高不能超过0。
languages.original_text:
The user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} explodes, dealing {uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to all creatures in a 3-cell radius.
The user's armour and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} cannot be more than 0 until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
使用者引爆{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}，对3格内的所有生物造成{uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920}点{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直击伤害{/g}。
直到战斗结束，使用者的护甲和{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}偏转{/g}最高不能超过0。

languages.text:
使用者の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}アーマー{/g} が爆発し、半径3セル内のすべてのクリーチャーに{uip|Damage|ecf41086be2743f2857ff0dceac7a920} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直接ダメージ{/g} を与える。
使用者の装甲と{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}偏向{/g} 、戦闘終了まで0以上にはならない。

The user's armour and {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g} cannot be more than 0 until the end of combat.
